review_reason: Phase 6 is blocked by a mathematical gap: density_frame_condition Case B1 (reflexive target) returns W=b, giving [W]=[b] in the quotient - not a strict intermediate. NoMaxOrder, NoMinOrder, and DenselyOrdered all require strict successors/predecessors/intermediates that the current approach cannot guarantee.

partial_progress.details: Analysis complete. 3 sorries remain in CantorApplication.lean. The quotient strictness gap is fundamental: when a point p's future witnesses are all mutually CanonicalR-related to p, no strict successor exists in the quotient. Similarly for DenselyOrdered: when the target b is reflexive, density_frame_condition returns W=b, not a strict intermediate.

errors.message: Phase 6 sorries require strict future/past/intermediate witnesses, but density_frame_condition Case B1 returns non-strict witnesses when target is reflexive
errors.recommendation: Revise approach: either (1) prove all MCSs in TimelineQuot are non-reflexive, (2) modify density_frame_condition to always return strict intermediates, or (3) use a different quotient construction that preserves density

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 6 blocked on quotient strictness gap. Analysis identified that density_frame_condition Case B1 returns non-strict witnesses. Phases 0-5 remain complete with zero sorries.
